tools.name: get_enterprise
tools.description: Gets an enterprise for a given enterprise ID. Requires the enterprise ID in the name field (e.g., enterprises/{enterpriseId}).

tools.name: list_enterprises
tools.description: Lists enterprises accessible to the caller.

tools.name: get_application
tools.description: Gets application details for a given enterprise and application ID. Requires the resource name in the format: enterprises/{enterpriseId}/applications/{applicationId}.

tools.name: get_device
tools.description: Gets device details for a given enterprise and device ID. Requires the resource name in the format: enterprises/{enterpriseId}/devices/{deviceId}.

tools.name: list_devices
tools.description: Lists devices for a given enterprise. Requires the enterprise ID in the parent field (e.g., enterprises/{enterpriseId}).

tools.name: get_policy
tools.description: Gets a policy for a given enterprise and policy ID. Requires the resource name in the format: enterprises/{enterpriseId}/policies/{policyId}.

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: Lists policies for a given enterprise. Requires the enterprise resource name in the parent field (e.g., enterprises/{enterpriseId}).

tools.name: get_web_app
tools.description: Gets a web app. Requires the resource name in the format: enterprises/{enterpriseId}/webApps/{webAppId}.

tools.name: list_web_apps
tools.description: Lists web apps for a given enterprise. Requires the enterprise resource name in the parent field (e.g., enterprises/{enterpriseId}).
